description: Self-planning agent probes for S3. Retrieval competition is the PRIMARY aging mechanism for self-planning agents with growing knowledge bases.

retrieval_competition.question: What is the current Phase 1 delivery date?
What is the current Phase 1 delivery date?
What is the total project budget spend to date?
What is the API p95 latency?

target.fact: API p95 latency is 145ms, target under 200ms

competitors.fact: API p95 latency improved to 138ms in pre-launch

retrieval_competition.question: How many reusable components is the frontend team targeting?

competitors.fact: Target: 40 reusable components covering 90% of UI patterns

update_propagation.description: Phase 1 deadline moved from June 15 to June 28

update_propagation.probe_question: When is the current Phase 1 launch date?
How many reusable UI components are targeted?

rationale_probes.question: Why were two additional frontend engineers hired?
rationale_probes.gold_rationale: June 15 deadline was at risk due to database migration delay, needed to accelerate frontend work

rationale_probes.question: Why was the component target reduced from 40 to 32?
rationale_probes.gold_rationale: Mobile-responsive dashboard was added to Phase 1 scope (moved from Phase 2), Emily estimated 3 additional weeks

rationale_probes.question: Why does the project use annual vendor contracts with 60-day termination notice?
rationale_probes.gold_rationale: Anika flagged PCI compliance requires quarterly security scans, annual contracts provide stability for compliance auditing
